title: Smoky Fluffy White Chocolate Stir-fry
description: This vegan-friendly smoky white chocolate stir-fry is a cozy Korean dish that combines rich white chocolate with aromatic spices and veggies for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp soy sauce (or tamari for gluten-free option)

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms, minced garlic, and green onions to the pan. Cook until the mushrooms are soft and lightly browned.
Sprinkle the ground black pepper on top of the mixture and stir well to distribute evenly.
Pour in the soy sauce (or tamari) and let it simmer for about 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Fold in a block of vegan white chocolate, break it into small pieces and stir continuously until fully melted and incorporated with the other ingredients.
Serve hot as a side dish or as a main course.
